faqData.question: What time should I arrive?
faqData.answer: Please arrive at least 1 hour before the ceremony so everyone can be seated on time.

faqData.question: Can I bring a plus one?
faqData.answer: Due to limited space, we can only accommodate guests listed on the invitation. Thank you for understanding.

faqData.question: Will there be parking available?
faqData.answer: Yes, parking will be available at the venue. Please allow extra time in case it gets busy.

faqData.question: What happens after the ceremony?
faqData.answer: Right after the ceremony, guests will be guided to the reception area for cocktails, dinner, and celebration.

faqData.question: Can I take photos during the ceremony?
faqData.answer: We kindly ask for an unplugged ceremony. Please keep your phones away and enjoy the moment with us.

faqData.question: Will there be food and drinks?
faqData.answer: Yes, dinner and drinks will be served during the reception. Come hungry!

faqData.question: Do you have a gift registry?
faqData.answer: Your presence is already a gift to us. But if you wish to bless us further, a small monetary gift would be greatly appreciated.

faqData.question: Who can I contact for questions on the day?
faqData.answer: You may reach out to our wedding coordinator (Stat Events) or the contact person (Ms. Ally) indicated in the invitation.

faqData.question: Are children invited?
faqData.answer: We are celebrating with adults only. We appreciate your understanding and hope you enjoy an evening with us.
